title: Software Update - DFU is not available if phone's battery is below 30%
scenario: DFU is blocked with a warning pop-up when the phone's battery is below 30% until the device is charged or plugged into a power source.
steps: Ensure the phone's battery level is below 30%.
Attempt to perform a DFU (Device Firmware Update) on the phone.
expected: A pop-up warning appears, informing the user that the battery lacks sufficient power. The DFU update does not proceed until the device is charged or plugged into a power source.
